loungeAccess.conditions: Railway lounge access only (no airport lounge); requires min. ₹20,000 spend in the previous month to unlock visits in the current month.

movieBenefit.description: 25% off (up to ₹100) on movie tickets via the District by Zomato app, once a month, requires at least one transaction in the previous month

history.oldValue: 10X rewards on dining/travel required min. ₹20,000 monthly spend to activate
history.newValue: 10X rewards on dining/travel/international spends apply from the first eligible transaction, no minimum spend required

source.name: IDFC FIRST Bank
source.document: Important Update Regarding FIRST Millennia Credit Card

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: Yes, IDFC FIRST Millennia has no joining or annual fee, ever.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: For a free card, yes — it offers accelerated reward points on dining, travel and international spends, a monthly movie discount, and railway lounge access, with no annual fee to justify.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: First-time credit card users or anyone wanting a no-fee card with decent reward points on everyday, dining and travel spends, plus railway lounge access.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: The standard Visa variant does not support UPI linking directly; IDFC FIRST offers a separate FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card that Millennia cardholders can additionally get for UPI payments.
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: No airport lounge access, but it offers 4 complimentary railway lounge visits per quarter, subject to spending ₹20,000 in the previous month.
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: A minimum annual income of around ₹3 lakh is typically required, subject to the bank's internal policies.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Frequent flyers who want airport lounge access, or spenders who value a high per-point redemption value, since IDFC FIRST's redemption rate is a relatively low ₹0.25/point.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: HDFC MoneyBack+, SBI SimplyCLICK, or Axis Ace for those wanting airport lounge access or a simpler higher-value cashback structure.
